name: Protein Sugar Cookies (Caramel + Graham)
description: FIRST DRAFT (to tune): protein sugar cookie reworked into a caramel + graham cookie - graham cracker crumbs folded into the dough for a golden-graham base, finished with a sugar-free caramel drizzle (0 cal) and a graham sprinkle. Doing BOTH caramel and graham for now; we can drop to just one, or go richer with real caramel, when we tune.

payload.instructionText: Once the cookies are set and cooled, drizzle with caramel and scatter a few extra graham cracker chunks on top. Chill briefly to set the drizzle. (Caramel = sugar-free syrup for 0 cal by default; see the note to swap in real brown-sugar caramel.)

payload.text: Break the graham crackers into rough ~1cm chunks and fold them in last for crunchy pockets (whisking them into the dry mix would pulverize them to crumbs). SF caramel syrup is the lean 0-cal drizzle; the real brown-sugar caramel sub-recipe is richer but costs calories.

payload.instructionText: Stir to combine, then let the bowl sit untouched 5 minutes so the whey and pudding starches swell into a shapeable dough (if still tacky, chill 5 more). Fold in the graham cracker chunks at the very end so they stay in chunky pieces rather than dissolving into the dough. Then cover and chill the dough ~30 minutes — same as the browned-butter cookies — to firm it for cleaner shaping and a thicker, chewier bake.
